Use this data source to query rules of a specific ECS security group.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_security_group_rules" "example" {
  id = data.edgenext_ecs_security_groups.example.security_groups[0].id
}

data "edgenext_ecs_security_groups" "example" {
  name  = "default"
  limit = 1
}
```

Argument Reference

* `id` - (Required) Security group ID.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `security_group_rules` - Rule list. Common fields include `id`, `security_group_id`, `direction`, `protocol`, `port_range_min`, `port_range_max`, and `remote_ip_prefix`.
